description: Cost and quality efficiency for one product: average session cost, session count, average cost per finalized requirement and per resolved inquiry. Read-only over sanba-analytics-* session_summary events (ADR-0061 P4).

configuration.query: FROM sanba-analytics-* | WHERE event_type == "session_summary" AND product_id == ?product_id | STATS sessions = COUNT(*), avg_cost_usd = AVG(payload.total_usd), avg_usd_per_finalized_requirement = AVG(payload.efficiency.usd_per_finalized_requirement), avg_usd_per_resolved_inquiry = AVG(payload.efficiency.usd_per_resolved_inquiry), avg_quality = AVG(payload.kpi.quality_overall) BY product_id

product_id.description: The SANBA product identifier to scope the analysis to.
